name: Trend Intelligence API — Cross-Platform Research Synthesis
description: Research any topic across Reddit, web, YouTube, and Twitter/X simultaneously. Returns structured intelligence: pattern detection, sentiment analysis, top discussions, and emerging signals.
longDescription: A synthesis engine — not just a scraper. Raw data from Reddit, web search, YouTube, and Twitter/X goes in; structured trend intelligence with cross-platform pattern detection comes out. Engagement-weighted scoring finds signals that matter. 30-day recency enforced. All requests routed through Proxies.sx mobile carrier IPs for maximum data yield.

POST /api/research.description: Cross-platform research synthesis. Post a topic, get patterns, sentiment, and top discussions across all platforms.

body.topic: string (required) — keyword or phrase to research

GET /api/trending.description: What is trending right now across requested platforms. Returns engagement-ranked topics.

query.platforms: string (optional, default: 'reddit,web') — comma-separated: reddit, web, youtube, twitter, x
query.limit: number (optional, default: 20, max: 50) — topics per platform

research.sentiment: { overall: string, by_platform: { [platform]: { positive%, neutral%, negative% } } }
research.meta: { sources_checked: number, platforms_used: string[], proxy: { ip, country, type }, generated_at: string }

signalStrengths.established: Pattern appears across 3+ platforms with high engagement
signalStrengths.reinforced: Pattern in 2+ platforms with moderate engagement
signalStrengths.emerging: Single platform but notable engagement spike

whyMobileProxy: Cross-platform scraping (Reddit + X + YouTube simultaneously) requires mobile carrier IPs to avoid per-platform rate limits. Reddit rate-limits datacenter IPs instantly. Twitter serves degraded content to non-mobile IPs. Mobile 4G/5G carrier IPs (Proxies.sx) mimic real device traffic, giving 5-10x more headroom per platform.
limitations: YouTube and Twitter results depend on availability of search index
Reddit: public posts only (no private subreddits)
30-day recency enforced — older signals may appear if engagement is very high
Cross-platform synthesis works best when topic appears on multiple platforms

vs.name: Brandwatch
vs.limitation: Enterprise only, no API access below $800/mo, no Reddit deep coverage

vs.name: Mention.com
vs.limitation: No YouTube, limited Reddit, no synthesis layer

vs.name: SparkToro
vs.limitation: Audience research only, no trend synthesis, no real-time data

vs.name: BuzzSumo
vs.limitation: Content analysis only, no cross-platform pattern detection, no sentiment

competitive.ourAdvantage: Cross-platform synthesis in a single API call. Pattern detection finds signals appearing on multiple platforms. $0.10-1.00/query vs $99-3000/month subscriptions.
